title: Device Settings - All toggles ON - Persist after closing tab, settings page or app
scenario: Toggle buttons in Device Settings remain stuck ON after closing/reopening tabs, returning to Device Home Screen, or restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on a connected device to enter Device Settings
Locate any toggle button (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications)
Close the Device Settings tab (navigate back to Home)
Reopen Device Settings for the same device
Toggle the button OFF again (if needed)
Return to the Device Home Screen
Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app
Navigate to Device Settings for the same device
expected: Toggle buttons should reflect the user's last action (ON or OFF) and persist correctly across navigation and app restarts.
